tags.name: Kennington
tags.wheelchair:description: Cross-platform interchange in same direction only. No entry or exit.

tags.name: Dalston Junction
tags.wheelchair:description: Wide gates, lift down to all plaforms, Radar key operated wheelchair accessible toilet near lift at ticket hall level. Step-free from platform to train.

tags.name: Westminster
tags.wheelchair:description: Lifts link all platforms on Jubilee and Circle/District lines. (photos to follow)

tags.name: Balham
tags.wheelchair:description: LU station not accessible. However, NR station is step-free to platform via the LU entrance.

tags.name: Old Street
tags.wheelchair:description: Steps between lower Northern & higher National Rail station levels. No Lifts.

tags.name: King's Cross St Pancras
tags.name:he: תחנת הרכבת התחתית קינגס קרוס סיינט פנקראס
tags.note: Official name: King's Cross St Pancras Underground Station
tags.wikipedia: en:King's Cross St Pancras tube station

tags.name: Stockwell
tags.wheelchair:description: Cross-platform interchange in same direction only. No entry or exit.

tags.name: Baker Street
tags.wheelchair:description: You can change between terminating Metropolitan line trains and trains continuing towards Aldgate. You can change between the Bakerloo line southbound by manual boarding ramp and the Jubilee line southbound. You can also change between the Bakerloo line n

tags.name: Paddington
tags.wikipedia: en:Paddington tube station (Bakerloo, Circle and District lines)

tags.name: Camden Town
tags.wheelchair:description: You can change between the northbound platform toward High Barnet and the northbound platform towards Edgeware.

tags.name: Edgware Road
tags.wikipedia: en:Edgware Road tube station (Circle, District and Hammersmith & City lines)

tags.name: Whitechapel
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Rotherhithe
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free from platform to train

tags.name: Surrey Quays
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free from platform to train

tags.name: Wapping
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free from platform to train. (NOT shown Step-free from street on 2017 TfL map)

tags.name: Mile End
tags.wheelchair:description: You can change between eastbound Central line, District line and the Hammersmith & City lines. You can change between westbound Central line, District line and the Hammersmith & City line. Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Cannon Street
tags.wheelchair:description: You can only enter and exit the westbound platform. Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: London Euston
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Euston
tags.wheelchair:description: You can change between the Victoria line southbound and the Northern line southbound via London Bridge. You can also change between the Victoria line northbound and the Northern line northbound.

tags.name: Imperial Wharf
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Blackfriars
tags.wheelchair:description: Lift to platform, step-free onto trains (Only Eastbound checked and photos today)

tags.name: London Victoria
tags.wheelchair:description: Concourse to platforms step-free & wide gates. Access to all trains by portable ramps, no Harrington Humps discovered yet.

tags.name: Balham
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: London Bridge
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free access street to train

tags.name: Aldgate East
tags.wheelchair:description: You can change between the District line westbound and the Hammersmith & City line westbound (Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp). You can change between the District line eastbound and the Hammersmith & City line eastbound.

tags.name: London Fenchurch Street
tags.wheelchair:description: The main entrance is the only entrance that has step free access. There is a lift to take you from the entrance to the station concourse and platform levels. Please note there is no step free access from the Coopers Road entrance to the station.

tags.name: West Brompton
tags.wheelchair:description: District line step-free eastbound only

tags.name: South Kensington
tags.wheelchair:description: Steps only from street level to platform level and subway to museums

tags.name: West Ham
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free access street to platform

tags.name: Stratford
tags.network: National Rail;London Underground;London Overground;Docklands Light Railway;Elizabeth line

tags.name: Southwark
tags.note: ticket retailers list CRS code as ZSO instead

tags.name: Hammersmith (Circle and Hammersmith & City lines)
tags.wikipedia: en:Hammersmith tube station (Circle and Hammersmith & City lines)

tags.name: Caledonian Road
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free since 1906.

tags.name: Oxford Circus
tags.wheelchair:description: Cross-platform interchange between Bakerloo and Victoria lines in same direction only. No entry or exit.

tags.name: Canada Water
tags.wheelchair:description: Overground platforms Step-free to train. Jubilee: Step-free access street to train.

tags.name: Moorgate
tags.wheelchair:description: Circle, Hammersmith & City and Metropolitan lines only.

tags.name: Clapham Junction
tags.wheelchair:description: London Overground access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Hammersmith (District and Piccadilly lines)
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free access street to platform
tags.wikipedia: en:Hammersmith tube station (District and Piccadilly lines)

tags.name: Bromley-by-Bow
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp

tags.name: Bermondsey
tags.note: The CRS is ZBE as listed in Network Rail sources, but ZEO in ticket retailing system

tags.name: High Street Kensington
tags.wheelchair:description: Step access only to all platforms from booking office and gateline.

tags.name: Gloucester Road
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free from train to Circle line platforms 2 & 3 to view Mural on north retaining wall. Stairs only between platforms and to booking office and gateline.

tags.name: Goodge Street
tags.wheelchair:description: No level access

tags.name: Highbury & Islington
tags.wheelchair:description: Level street access. Lifts from concourse to Overground platforms (1,2,7,8) + portable ramps. Escalators, then stairs to Victoria and GN platforms (3,4,5,6) No interchange underground.

tags.name: Euston Square
tags.wheelchair:description: You can only enter and exit the westbound Hammersmith & City, Circle and Metropolitan lines platform.

tags.name: Maryland
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.description: This station has Wadsworth lifts modernised by Otis.
tags.name: Regent's Park
Shepherd's Bush
tags.wheelchair:description: London Overground only. Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp. Use the ticket hall entrance for both platforms.

tags.name: Shoreditch High Street
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free from platform to train. (TfL map shows fully Step-free)

tags.name: Caledonian Road & Barnsbury
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp

tags.name: Hackney Downs
tags.wheelchair:note: Step-free access to Platform 1 from Hackney Central only.

tags.name: Homerton
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Hackney Wick
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.

tags.name: Waterloo East
tags.wheelchair:description: Step free access to Waterloo East is only through use of lift at Waterloo Main. Ramps access to the platforms is steep.

tags.name: Maze Hill
tags.wheelchair:description: Access from platform to train by manual boarding ramp.
